mission: Publish one authoritative non-production canary and rollback harness that rehearses wave-action preview, execution, observation, settlement, rollback evidence, supersession, and kill-switch posture before any live production rollout exists.

gap_resolutions.summary: par_102 fixes the rehearsal ring set to local, ci-preview, integration, and preprod-like surfaces now, so later live cohort logic can harden blast-radius controls without rewriting the canonical wave-action objects.

Where richer recovery dispositions are not yet authored, the harness narrows posture to read_only or recovery_only and still requires explicit rollback target, runbook binding, and recovery evidence before accepting the action.

follow_on_dependencies.summary: Later governance approvals may add stronger operator confirmation, incident linkage, and blast-radius authorization without changing the meaning of preview, receipt, observation, or settlement records published here.
The shell-facing runtime cockpit can extend presentation and handoff layers later, but it must consume the same canary scenario catalog and settled wave-action objects emitted now.

records.title: Happy-path canary start and dwell
records.description: Starts a local rehearsal canary on the exact tuple and leaves the wave in accepted pending observation instead of claiming live convergence too early.

summary.title: Happy-path canary start and dwell
summary.description: Starts a local rehearsal canary on the exact tuple and leaves the wave in accepted pending observation instead of claiming live convergence too early.

records.title: Widen after satisfied observation
records.description: Widens the same local wave only after the observation window and readiness tuple are both satisfied for the same release and rollback target.

summary.title: Widen after satisfied observation
summary.description: Widens the same local wave only after the observation window and readiness tuple are both satisfied for the same release and rollback target.

records.title: Pause on constrained guardrail
records.description: Pauses a preview-ring rollout when stale rehearsal proof and constrained continuity prevent a safe widen, without escalating directly into rollback or kill-switch.

summary.title: Pause on constrained guardrail
summary.description: Pauses a preview-ring rollout when stale rehearsal proof and constrained continuity prevent a safe widen, without escalating directly into rollback or kill-switch.

records.title: Rollback on trigger breach
records.description: Exercises explicit rollback when continuity and restore proof breach the watch window, proving the target tuple and rollback evidence are known before the action settles.

summary.title: Rollback on trigger breach
summary.description: Exercises explicit rollback when continuity and restore proof breach the watch window, proving the target tuple and rollback evidence are known before the action settles.

records.title: Kill-switch on trust or parity failure
records.description: Triggers the rehearsal kill-switch when preprod trust, provenance, and parity posture degrade past safe pause or rollback-only behaviour.

summary.title: Kill-switch on trust or parity failure
summary.description: Triggers the rehearsal kill-switch when preprod trust, provenance, and parity posture degrade past safe pause or rollback-only behaviour.

records.title: Rollforward after superseded tuple and fresh proof
records.description: Shows that a prior rollforward preview is superseded before the fresh tuple with current readiness proof is allowed to settle satisfied.

summary.title: Rollforward after superseded tuple and fresh proof
summary.description: Shows that a prior rollforward preview is superseded before the fresh tuple with current readiness proof is allowed to settle satisfied.
